import React from "react"; import { Trash, Eye, Book } from "react-bootstrap-icons"; import { Card, Button, Container, Row, Col } from "react-bootstrap"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; function Deck({ props }) { return props.forEach((item) => { return ( <> Title{item.name}

{/* card count */} cards

 Description{/** deck description */} ); }); } export default Deck;
